# Vendored Tavily cookbook references

Selective MIT-licensed reference material from [tavily-ai/tavily-cookbook](https://github.com/tavily-ai/tavily-cookbook).

Runtime code lives in `src/market_intel/toolkit/` and `extended/` — not copied wholesale. See:

- `vendor/tavily-cookbook/README.md` — LangGraph social / company intelligence patterns
- `vendor/company-research/README.md` — L1 company brief flow attribution

Do not commit API keys or upstream `.env` files.
